overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from GTA V showing a walk through the Los Santos International Airport area. The character moves from under a highway overpass past modern circular buildings, a large airplane sculpture, and along a curved pedestrian walkway.

events.description: exits covered area under overpass into open street with crosswalk

agents.ego_description: walking steadily under the concrete overpass past the large SIX sign on the left wall

entered.detail: large metallic letters mounted on concrete wall under the overpass
massive curved concrete highway structure overhead with hanging vines
well-maintained green lawn area between concrete structures
contemporary building with glass facade visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: Walking under a massive concrete highway overpass with the SIX sign visible on the left wall. The area features a grassy plaza and transitions from sheltered shade to open sunlight as the camera approaches the street.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban street with modern circular building

events.description: slight turn left to approach the large airplane sculpture ahead

agents.ego_description: walking along the curved road with the distinctive circular-patterned building on the left side

notable_agents.action: worker in yellow safety vest walking near the sculpture area

entered.detail: modern white building with distinctive grid of circular windows
large metallic sculpture featuring two airplanes on curved supports
pair of cylindrical green columns near the sculpture

segments.scene_description: Moving along the open sunlit street with the circular-patterned building dominating the left side. The camera approaches the impressive airplane sculpture while a worker in a yellow vest walks nearby.

scene_state.functional_zone: airplane sculpture plaza and restaurant entrance

events.description: passes the airplane sculpture and approaches the Sightings restaurant entrance
turns right to enter the curved walkway beside the restaurant

agents.ego_description: approaching the Sightings restaurant entrance and turning onto the curved pedestrian walkway

notable_agents.action: man in purple shirt standing near the restaurant entrance
security guard in uniform near the building corner

entered.detail: building entrance with green oval sign reading 'Sightings Restaurant'
paved pedestrian path curving along the building facade

segments.scene_description: Passing the impressive airplane sculpture and arriving at the Sightings restaurant where several pedestrians gather near the entrance. The camera turns onto a curved walkway that runs alongside the circular building.

scene_state.functional_zone: curved walkway along circular building facade

agents.ego_description: walking along the curved pathway beside the tall circular building with patterned facade

notable_agents.action: two people walking ahead on the pathway near a trash can

entered.detail: red and green ornamental bushes lining the walkway edge
tall curved street light along the pathway

segments.scene_description: Continuing along the curved walkway flanked by the circular building's patterned wall on the right and landscaped bushes on the left. The pathway curves gently with a few pedestrians ahead walking in the same direction.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the shaded depths of a concrete overpass into a bright, modern airport plaza. It begins beneath a massive highway structure with a SIX sign on the left wall, moving through a grassy plaza as the lighting shifts from deep shade to open sunlight. As the camera reaches the street, the view opens up to reveal a circular-patterned building and a worker in a yellow vest walking toward a large airplane sculpture. The scene then shifts past the sculpture to the entrance of the Sightings restaurant where pedestrians gather, before turning onto a curved pedestrian walkway. Finally, the camera glides along this path, flanked by the building's patterned wall on one side and landscaped bushes on the other, following a few distant pedestrians.
